description: Official Terraform provider for Xquik's X/Twitter API: configure API access and automate X data workflows with infrastructure code.
rules: Authenticate with provider fields or the documented X_TWITTER_SCRAPER_* environment variables.
Use docs/index.md and examples for generated provider documentation and Terraform examples.
Use scripts/build for local development until Terraform Registry publication is complete.
Never commit API keys, local credentials, Terraform state files, or local provider binaries.
